zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth FitzHugh於大約1455年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，她的父親Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh27歲，母親Alice Neville26歲。她於1475年6月之前與Sir William Parr在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1507年7月10日之前在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth FitzHugh于大约1455年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh27岁，母亲Alice Neville26岁。她于1475年6月之前与Sir William Parr在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1507年7月10日之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth FitzHugh was born about 1455, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh, was 27 and her mother, Alice Neville, was 26. She married Sir William Parr before June 1475, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 10 July 1507, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth FitzHugh est née environ 1455, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Neville, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Parr avant juin 1475, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 10 juillet 1507, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth FitzHugh um 1455 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh 27 und ihre Mutter Alice Neville 26. Sie hat vor Juni 1475 in Yorkshire, England Sir William Parr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 10. Juli 1507 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzHugh è nata il circa 1455 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Alice Neville, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Parr prima del giugno 1475, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 10 luglio 1507, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzHughが約1455年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHughは27歳，母Alice Nevilleは26歳であった。1475年6月以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir William Parrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1507年7月10日以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzHugh(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Neville(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1475년 6월 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir William Parr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 7월 10일 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzHugh nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Neville, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Parr antes junho de 1475, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 10 de julho de 1507, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth FitzHugh родилась около 1455 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Neville, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Parr перед июнь 1475 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 10 июля 1507 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth FitzHugh nació aproximadamente 1455, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alice Neville, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir William Parr antes de junio de 1475, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 10 de julio de 1507, en Inglaterra.
